Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Consultant's Guild]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Consultant's Guild is a group that Naberius warns not to underestimate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Architects rule in the Consultant's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Consultant's Guild is known to help anyone for enough cash and is dedicated to the Empire.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — The Consultant’s Guild can be hired by clients.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Consultant’s Guild maintains archives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Members of the Consultant’s Guild arrived at 75 Hanberry Street to investigate suspicions for their clients.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera is starting to like the Consultant's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The crest of the Consultant’s Guild is a simple pair of gardening shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultant's Guild receives information relayed by Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — The Consultant’s Guild is a group that Lucan hopes to steer.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Consultant’s Guild is one of the groups that may sway public opinion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Consultant's Guild is described as the most loyal Guild in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Consultant’s Guild manages each client's issues with efficiency and removes threats to clients under their protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Calder is considering whether or not to attack the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Calder addresses the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Kelarac wants Calder and his allies to cut through the Consultant's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Consultant’s Guild is an organization.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Kerian serves as one of the three leaders of the Consultant's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — The Consultant's Guild has a chapter house on the western side of Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan has an attachment to the Consultant's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultant’s Guild sends Soulbound on investigations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultant’s Guild is involved in a looming conflict with other Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Consultant's Guild is the organization Shera has plunged into conflict.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Consultant’s Guild is a group that Calder hopes will join them rather than remain in open rebellion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Bliss mentions the Consultant’s Guild in relation to her revenge.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Consultant’s Guild employs workers in the Rainworth docks and fish warehouses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Shera is the Head of the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — The Consultant’s Guild provides experts to redesign and rebuild security.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Members of the Consultant’s Guild were among those left standing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultant’s Guild is represented by Shera and three High Councilors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultant’s Guild tried to bribe the Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultant’s Guild has headquarters on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Consultant's Guild has not appointed a new Guild Head for some time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen is a member of the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The power and influence of the Consultant’s Guild dipped during years when Regents were active.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — There is a concern that the Consultant’s Guild might be shut down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Consultant’s Guild is a group that observes conversations between clients.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — The Consultant’s Guild has unspoken rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The Consultant’s Guild produces reports that identify Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — The Consultant’s Guild is a group that Shera and Lucan were not firmly bound to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — The Consultant's Guild allowed the Empire to rot for three years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — The Consultant’s Guild has three leaders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — The Consultant’s Guild has laws regarding assault, destruction of property, divulgence of secrets, trespassing, and defiance of orders.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
